headline: General Updates
summary: The Board has approved the transfer of the company’s Seat Trim business related to certain models by way of slump sale as a going concern to its wholly owned subsidiary, NDR Auto Component South Private Limited. The Board has approved the transfer of the company’s Sunshade business by way of slump sale as a going concern to its Joint Venture, NDR Hayashi Automotive India Private Limited.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting - Approval of the Merger of M/s.
summary: Outcome of Board Meeting - Approval of the Merger of M/s. SEBI/HO/CFD/PoD2/CIR/P/0155 dated November 11, 2024 Circular.

headline: General Updates - Meeting of the unsecured creditors scheduled on 13th June 2026
summary: Somany Ceramics Limited has informed the Exchange about meeting of the unsecured creditors of the Company scheduled to be held on Saturday, 13th June, 2026.

headline: Copy of Newspaper Publication - NCLT convened Meeting of equity shareholders
summary: Asian Energy Services Limited has informed the Exchange about Copy of Newspaper Advertisement of NCLT convened Meeting of equity shareholders.

headline: Updates - Report from the Audit Committee and Independent Directors certifying distribution
summary: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Report from the Audit Committee and Independent Directors of the Company certifying distribution.

headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
summary: The shares of QCL and its demerged entities held by the trust are subjected to fair valuation. The Company had completed the acquisition of Resorts Business from Nature Trails Resort Private Limited (NTRPL), (Wholly owned step-down subsidiary of the Company) on 19 March 2025 through slump sale for consideration of Rs. 522.5 Mn (gross) as per the terms mentioned in the Business Transfer Agreement as per appointed date 01 March 2025.
